snippets.comment: There are three exams, no homework, and everything is self-study. I was lost during every lecture.  He even changes exam dates from what's listed on the syllabus—I once showed up expecting a review session and ended up taking the exam instead.

This guy needs his own comedy show, just show up to class take good notes and study them before the exam which he provides a study guide for that is the exact same as the actual exams, he's really funny, just don't piss him off. 4 exams only 3 midterms 1 final and drops lowest midterm and NO CANVAS
He is not a math professor. He should get fired. does not explain anything. or teach you math, and you will get lost. Not recommended at all.
